masthead.tagline: The evening edition, assembled without its editor.

lead.headline: Mbappe first to win Golden Boot twice as Rodri named best player
lead.blurb: Kylian Mbappe has become the first player to win the World Cup Golden Boot twice after earning the award for top scorer at the 2026 tournament, while Spain's Rodri lands the Golden Ball as the best player.

secondaries.headline: We want Texans to know their rights
Gilbert has 10 strikeouts in 6 innings, Raley and Young hit HRs as Mariners beat Giants 6-3
secondaries.blurb: — Logan Gilbert had 10 strikeouts across six strong innings, Luke Raley and Cole Young homered, and the Seattle Mariners beat the San Francisco Giants 6-3 on Sunday.

secondaries.headline: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making
secondaries.blurb: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making Here's an entertaining perspective from Nik Suresh on the AI mania that is overwhelming the large companies that he consults with. It's crammed with spicy anecdotes from anonymous sources. In one extreme case, I have seen an executive confess that they had never even used ChatGPT or any AI tool in their life, immediately after producing a technical s

stories.headline: YouTubers sneak into The Odyssey screening by bringing Trojan Horse to theater
stories.blurb: In a video shared to TikTok, a team of YouTubers tried to avoid paying for tickets to see The Odyssey by sneaking into the cinema in a Trojan horse.

stories.headline: Hatsune Miku World Cup custody battle timeline: Every owner and victim of the 2-1 curse
stories.blurb: Hatsune Miku has passed from Japan to Brazil, Norway, England, and Argentina during the 2026 World Cup, with Spain now able to claim her in the final.

stories.headline: Hatsune Miku figure turns pop-star into DoodleBob armed with the magic pencil
stories.blurb: Hatsune Miku has joined forces with one of SpongeBob SquarePants’ strangest villains for a limited-edition DoodleBob figure.

stories.headline: Skydiving priest performs blessing 14,000 ft in the air
stories.blurb: A vicar from the UK completed his first-ever skydive from 14,000 feet to raise money for his church, and performed a blessing mid-fall.

stories.headline: Old School RuneScape comes to indie mega-hit Meccha Chameleon with Lumbridge map
stories.blurb: Jagex has teamed up with community creators to turn Lumbridge into a playable Meccha Chameleon arena, complete with classic NPCs and RuneScape items.

stories.headline: Elderly man arrested in 45-year-long murder case after police use his trash to find DNA
stories.blurb: A 79-year-old man has been arrested after investigators linked him to a decades-old murder case using DNA samples found in his trash.

stories.headline: Gilbert has 10 strikeouts in 6 innings, Raley and Young hit HRs as Mariners beat Giants 6-3
stories.blurb: — Logan Gilbert had 10 strikeouts across six strong innings, Luke Raley and Cole Young homered, and the Seattle Mariners beat the San Francisco Giants 6-3 on Sunday.

stories.headline: Cardinals executive to appeal ban for violating NFL's gambling policy
stories.blurb: Cardinals personnel executive Ryan Gold is appealing an indefinite suspension for violating the NFL's gambling policy, his attorney said.

stories.headline: Johnson, Soler and Neto power the Angels to a 3-2 win over the Tigers
stories.blurb: — Ryan Johnson struck out five and allowed one run in five solid innings, Jorge Soler and Zach Neto delivered RBI hits and the Los Angeles Angels snapped a four-game skid with a 3-2 win over the Detroit Tigers on Sunday.

stories.headline: Abrams and Crews hit back-to-back homers Nationals beat Athletics 5-2
stories.blurb: — CJ Abrams and Dylan Crews hit back-to-back homers in the fifth inning to send the Washington Nationals to a 5-2 victory over the Athletics on Sunday.

stories.headline: Brooklyn Nets vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights

stories.headline: Buoyed by Drake Baldwin's breakout, Braves secure series win
stories.blurb: After returning from an oblique injury that kept him sidelined for nearly a month, Atlanta Braves catcher Drake Baldwin was a career-best 5 for 5 at the plate and homered twice in his club's 8-5 victory over the Texas Rangers on Sunday at Truist Park.

stories.headline: Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now
stories.blurb: In Rewriting Bun in Rust Jarred Sumner made the following claim: Claude Code v2.1.181 (released June 17th) and later use the Rust port of Bun. Startup got 10% faster on Linux but otherwise, barely anyone noticed. Boring is good. I decided to have a poke at my own Claude Code installation to see if I could find evidence that it was using Bun written in Rust. I found these two commands convincing: s

stories.headline: SQLite Query Explainer
stories.blurb: Tool: SQLite Query Explainer Julia Evan's, in Learning a few things about running SQLite : Maybe one day I’ll learn to read a query plan. Big same.... which inspired me to have Fable build this interactive explain tool, which runs SQLite in Python in Pyodide in Web Assembly in the browser and adds a layer of explanation to the results of both EXPLAIN and EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN. Approach with caution,

stories.headline: Claude make Fable 5 permanent
stories.blurb: Claude make Fable 5 permanent An update from the @claudeai account on Twitter: Beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans, at 50% of limits. Pro and Team Standard users will continue to have access to Fable via usage credits, and will receive a one-time $100 credit. As I was saying last week , the competition from GPT-5.6 Sol (and maybe to a lesser extent

stories.headline: nascheme/quixote
stories.blurb: nascheme/quixote A certain vintage if Python web nerd might be delighted to learn that the most recent commit to the Quixote web framework was six hours ago . The oldest commit in that repo is from 21 years ago, and that was the initial import of Quixote 2.4 from Subversion into Git. Tags: computer-history , python , web-frameworks

stories.headline: Mbappe first to win Golden Boot twice as Rodri named best player
stories.blurb: Kylian Mbappe has become the first player to win the World Cup Golden Boot twice after earning the award for top scorer at the 2026 tournament, while Spain's Rodri lands the Golden Ball as the best player.

stories.headline: Who made the difference for Spain? World Cup final player ratings
stories.blurb: BBC Sport journalist Neil Johnston rates the players after the World Cup final between Spain and Argentina.

stories.headline: Shakira, Madonna, Justin Bieber and BTS perform at colourful World Cup half-time show
stories.blurb: Robbie Williams and Jennifer Hudson also performed, with Kylie Jenner and Timothee Chalamet among the celebrities in the crowds.

stories.headline: Ferran Torres gives Spain extra-time lead against Argentina
stories.blurb: Ferran Torres breaks the deadlock, scoring in extra time for Spain in the World Cup final against Argentina at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

stories.headline: A cavalcade of international stars headlined the World Cup's first-ever halftime final show
stories.blurb: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise.

stories.headline: Fire crews battling blaze on Arthur’s Seat in Edinburgh
stories.blurb: A huge plume of smoke could be seen from as far away as Fife on Sunday evening.

stories.headline: Burnham to promise 'more breathing room' for people in first speech as PM
stories.blurb: The Labour leader will say he is "acutely conscious" of the UK's high turnover of prime ministers, as he becomes the seventh in 10 years on Monday.

stories.headline: Evenepoel criticises 'inhuman' night doping tests as Vingegaard crashes out
stories.blurb: Remco Evenepoel criticises "inhuman" middle-of-the night doping tests at the Tour de France after winning stage 15, while two-time champion Jonas Vingegaard crashes out.

stories.headline: 10 best anime to watch if you love The Odyssey (#4 is a near-perfect masterpiece)
stories.blurb: Some are sword-and-sandals classics, while others are homecoming adventures.

stories.headline: World of Warcraft and RuneScape Fans Want Official Jimothy Support After Game Devs Show Love for Viral Raccoon
stories.blurb: The internet has fallen in love with a viral raccoon named Jimothy, and so has the gaming industry.

stories.headline: Xbox Says More Exclusives Are Coming But Tells Players Not to 'Overly Fixate on Single-Player' Games
stories.blurb: Executives at Xbox have once again attempted to clarify the company's approach to exclusives, promising that "Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are not the only titles" it's planning.

stories.headline: Game of Thrones is finally getting the PC game we've been waiting for next year
stories.blurb: Game of Thrones: War for Westeros has been delayed into early 2027, so we'll have to wait and see if it can redeem the franchise's video game woes

stories.blurb: Director Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey has blown box office expectations out of the water with an opening weekend that brought home an incredible $264.064 million worldwide.

stories.headline: Canada’s FEQ Gets The Festival Experience Right
stories.blurb: If the summer 2026 US concert season has a theme, it’s blue dot fever . Tour cancellations abound, while other shows are way undersold. Theories abound as to why this fever rages, although it goes without saying that concerts are expensive: A Pollstar study found that the average ticket price for the top 100 worldwide tours rose by 37.2% between 2019 and 2025.
